title: Functions, Domain, and Range
description: Types of functions (even, odd, periodic, composite, inverse) and sketching basic graphs.

title: Limits and Continuity
description: Evaluating limits algebraically, limits at infinity, L'Hopital's rule, and the concept of continuity.

title: Differentiation from First Principles
description: The formal definition of a derivative and calculating gradients of curves.

title: Rules of Differentiation
description: Product rule, quotient rule, chain rule, and implicit differentiation.

title: Derivatives of Special Functions
description: Differentiation of trigonometric, exponential, and logarithmic functions.

title: Applications of Differentiation
description: Rates of change, tangents and normals, turning points (maxima and minima), and curve sketching.

title: Indefinite Integrals
description: Integration as reverse differentiation, standard integrals, and the constant of integration.

title: Methods of Integration
description: Integration by substitution, integration by parts, and integration using partial fractions.

title: Definite Integrals and Applications
description: The fundamental theorem of calculus, finding the area under a curve, and volume of solids of revolution.
